_comment: Curated high-winrate / meta picks per role. There is no free public API for global winrates, so this list is maintained by hand — update it each patch from op.gg / u.gg / lolalytics. 'id' must be the Data Dragon champion id (e.g. 'MonkeyKing' for Wukong, 'Chogath' for Cho'Gath).

TOP.why: Lane bully, snowballs hard, low skill floor for high reward
Strong stats, simple kit, great teamfight ult
Easy blind into AD tops, game-changing ult, cheap build
Consistent high winrate, 1v1 machine with ult
Strong all game, executes divers, forgiving

JUNGLE.why: High sustain, easy clear, strong early ganks
Simple, huge AoE CC, scales with any comp
Map-wide pressure with ult, strong duelist
Long-range engage, very tanky, great in teamfights

MIDDLE.why: Easiest mage, point-and-click burst + AoE stun
Safe wave-clear, suppression ult shuts down carries
Anti-AP, roams with ult, tanky mid
Anti-mobility kit, strong burst, easy combos

BOTTOM.why: Strong lane, easy kit, huge ult
Forgiving spacing, high impact roots and ult
Flexible builds, scales hard, safe with R

UTILITY.why: Hard engage, tons of CC, simple gameplan
Raw healing power, easy to play
One hook can win a game, high pressure
